name: Umayr ibn Abdullah
title: Brave Warrior
shortDescription: A brave of the Madhhij tribe who bravely went to the battlefield on Ashura and was martyred after a heavy fight.
fullStory:
Umayr ibn Abdullah al-Madhhiji was a brave Shia and warrior from Kufa who managed to join Imam Hussain's (AS) companions in Karbala.

On Ashura, when many of the Imam's companions had been martyred, he sought permission from the Imam and rushed to the battlefield. He recited poetry and reproached the Kufan army for their betrayal.

Umayr was a very capable warrior and managed to create a deep breach in the enemy's ranks, striking down many. Finally, after a valiant fight, he was martyred by 'Muslim ibn Abdullah al-Dababi' and his accomplices.

By sacrificing his life, he showed that the love for the Ahl al-Bayt (AS) has deep roots among the noble Arab tribes.
quoteArabic: السَّلامُ عَلَى عُمَيْرِ بْنِ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ المَذْحِجِيِّ...
quote: (Ziyarat al-Nahiya:) Peace be upon Umayr ibn Abdullah al-Madhhiji...
